1.q: The AgERF8 mRNA accumulated in response to both abscisic acid (ABA) signaling and salt treatment. AgERF8 transgenic lines showed low tolerance to ABA and salt stress than wild-type plants.

2.q: Arabidopsis plants transformed with celery's mannose-6-phosphate reductase (M6PR) gene produce mannitol and grow normally in the absence of stress.
